nasb.text: after he had defeated Sihon the king of the Amorites, who lived in Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, who lived in Ashtaroth and Edrei.

esv.text: after he had defeated Sihon the king of the Amorites, who lived in Heshbon, and Og the king of Bashan, who lived in Ashtaroth and in Edrei.

cnv.text: 當時，他已經擊敗了住在希實本的亞摩利人的王西宏，和住在亞斯他錄與以得來的巴珊王噩。

ccb.text: 那时，他已经打败了希实本的亚摩利王西宏以及盘踞在以得来和亚斯她录的巴珊王噩。
